text:
(a) The department may adopt rules providing for administrative penalties for a failure to register or submit information and documents under the unified carrier registration plan and agreement or for a violation of the unified carrier registration plan and agreement.

(b) The notice, hearing, and other procedural requirements of Section 643.2525 (Administrative Hearing Process) apply to the imposition of an administrative penalty under this section as if the action were being taken under that section.

(c) The amount of an administrative penalty imposed under this section is calculated in the same manner as the amount of an administrative penalty imposed under Section 643.251 (Administrative Penalty) .
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 645. Unified Carrier Registration
##### § 645.003 — Enforcement Rules

(a) The department may adopt rules providing for administrative penalties for a failure to register or submit information and documents under the unified carrier registration plan and agreement or for a violation of the unified carrier registration plan and agreement.

(b) The notice, hearing, and other procedural requirements of Section 643.2525 (Administrative Hearing Process) apply to the imposition of an administrative penalty under this section as if the action were being taken under that section.

(c) The amount of an administrative penalty imposed under this section is calculated in the same manner as the amount of an administrative penalty imposed under Section 643.251 (Administrative Penalty) .

*Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 703 (H.B.3254), Sec. 15, eff. January 1, 2018.*

subsections.label: c
subsections.text: The amount of an administrative penalty imposed under this section is calculated in the same manner as the amount of an administrative penalty imposed under Section 643.251 (Administrative Penalty) .
